diagnose.primary_diagnosis: 大规模重组后稳态第4轮确认。引擎正确行为=OBSERVE静默+基础设施维护(归档case-015为Case 19+校准更新+2新领域研究记录+案例写入)。L3降频至240min确认——连续4次零增量，引擎在无用户交互下的合法操作范围已穷尽。2个新研究领域(LLM采购文档分析+事件驱动回测架构)对pachong-master和moni有未来价值——写入l3_findings供引用。

queries: LLM procurement tender document analysis automated bid scoring NLP 2026
real-time financial market data pipeline event-driven backtesting architecture 2026
key_findings: LLM Procurement 2026: 8 Chinese departments mandated AI expansion in tendering nationwide. Dominant architecture = hybrid rules-engine + LLM semantic reasoning + human-in-the-loop. Jiangsu system: >90% time reduction, >96% accuracy. Anhui/iFLYTEK: 36,000 docs audited, 91.17% expert concurrence, 324 collusion cases cracked. RAG anchoring + schema-enforced JSON output + neurosymbolic XAI approaches. Directly applicable to pachong-master AI ranking redesign.

Event-Driven Backtesting 2026: Four-layer architecture (Ingestion→EventEngine→Strategy→Execution) with deterministic time injection is gold standard. Same strategy class runs unchanged in backtest AND live. Clock trait: TestClock for backtest, LiveClock for production — identical interface. 19x faster than Backtrader, 8x than Zipline, 5x than QuantConnect LEAN. Quote-aware execution (buys at ask, sells at bid). Rust ecosystem emerging (rustrade, NautilusTrader). Directly applicable to moni backtest.py event-driven refactoring.
Both domains converge on same 2026 pattern: hybrid architecture (rules+LLM for procurement, deterministic+event-driven for trading) with human-in-the-loop governance and schema-enforced outputs.
research.note: 2 queries, each returning 7+ independent high-quality sources from government documents, academic papers (IEEE/ECIS/arXiv), production systems (iFLYTEK/Baidu/JTC), and open-source frameworks (rustrade/NautilusTrader/ml4t-backtest). Both domains are NEW — not covered in prior 15 L3 cycles. Prior domains: autonomous agents v1-v7, web scraping v1-v7, quant backtesting v1-v2, social media automation, AI content generation, factor mining automation, multi-project workspace management. These two new domains have high direct applicability to pachong-master (AI ranking) and moni (backtesting architecture).

lessons_learned: 用户指令'keep it minimal'是最高优先级信号——引擎应将工具调用压缩到绝对必要范围(归档+校准+研究+案例)
L3在无用户交互下的价值产出：方法论级(前3轮)→工具级(第4-6轮)→增量确认(第7+轮)→仅档案维护+研究记录有价值
2个新研究领域(LLM采购文档+事件驱动回测)对活跃项目有直接未来价值——写入l3_findings供后续引用，不在部署后稳态推送建议
case-015归档闭环完成——19个案例全归档，档案完整性维护
L3降频至240min(max)在连续4次零增量下是正确设置——引擎在无用户交互下应最低频率运行
大规模重组后稳态是引擎应尊重的状态——不因'发现可优化点'而打破部署后平静
